title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Zensar Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Zensar Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Zensar Technologies:
Zensar Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies!
